narrative.headline: What 2016 Honda Fit owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 116 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (47% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: OUR HONDA DEALERSHIP HAS INFORMED US THE THE CHECK ENGINE LIGHT IS THE RESULT OF RODENTS CHEWING ON A WIRING HARNESS. THIS IS AN ISSUE WITH HONDA USING SOY COVERED WIRES. HONDA IS REPORTED TO HAVE KNOWN ABOUT THIS ISSUE FOR YEARS. HONDA WILL NOT COVER IT UNDER WARRANTY. ALTHOUGH
